ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hpc_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HPC cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the HPC cluster */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the HPC cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the HPC cluster */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system administrator responsible for the cluster */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cluster was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cluster (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "num_nodes" INTEGER /* Number of nodes in the cluster */,
  "num_cores" INTEGER /* Number of cores in the cluster */,
  "total_memory" TEXT /* Total memory in the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hpc_clusters_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES system_admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the system administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the system administrator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the system administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the system administrator (e.g., cluster admin, system engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the system administrator belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., CPU, memory, I/O) */,
  "threshold_high" REAL /* High threshold value for the metric */,
  "threshold_low" REAL /* Low threshold value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HPC cluster */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "avg_value" REAL /* Average value of the metric */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the metric */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the metric */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the metric */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_data_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES hpc_clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data engineer, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES metric_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HPC cluster */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high CPU usage, memory leak) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES hpc_clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware configuration */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HPC cluster */,
  "cpu_model" TEXT /* Model of the CPU */,
  "memory_size" TEXT /* Total memory size */,
  "storage_size" TEXT /* Total storage size */,
  "gpu_model" TEXT /* Model of the GPU */,
  "other_specs" TEXT /* Other specifications (e.g., network bandwidth) */,
  "interconnect_type" TEXT /* Type of interconnect (e.g., Infiniband, Ethernet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_configurations_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES hpc_clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software configuration */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HPC cluster */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "compiler_version" TEXT /* Version of the compiler */,
  "library_versions" TEXT /* Versions of libraries used */,
  "other_specs" TEXT /* Other specifications (e.g., custom scripts) */,
  "scheduler_type" TEXT /* Type of scheduler (e.g., Slurm, Torque) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_configurations_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES hpc_clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workloads" (
  "workload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workload */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HPC cluster */,
  "workload_name" TEXT /* Name of the workload */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the workload */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the workload */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the workload (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the workload */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application running in the workload */,
  "num_nodes" INTEGER /* Number of nodes used by the workload */,
  "num_cores" INTEGER /* Number of cores used by the workload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workloads_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES hpc_clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workload_metrics" (
  "workload_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workload metric */,
  "workload_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workload */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "avg_value" REAL /* Average value of the metric for the workload */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the metric for the workload */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the metric for the workload */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the metric */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workload_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workload_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workload_metrics_workload_id FOREIGN KEY ("workload_id") REFERENCES workloads ("workload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workload_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "workload_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workload */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., start, end, error) */,
  "event_message" TEXT /* Message describing the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workload_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workload_logs_workload_id FOREIGN KEY ("workload_id") REFERENCES workloads ("workload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HPC cluster */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES hpc_clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data point */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "avg_value" REAL /* Average value of the metric in the report */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the metric in the report */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the metric in the report */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the metric */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Ganglia, Nagios) */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_third_party_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the integration (e.g., Ganglia, Nagios) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the integration */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the integration is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES third_party_data ("source")
)
